name: LSI Corporation
description: LSI Corporation was a prominent American technology company that specialized in the design and manufacture of semiconductors and software for storage and networking solutions. The company provided critical components for data centers, mobile networks, and client computing systems, focusing on flash storage and high-speed connectivity. In 2014, LSI Corporation was acquired by Avago Technologies for approximately $6.6 billion. Following a series of subsequent mergers and acquisitions, the assets and technologies formerly held by LSI Corporation were integrated into the portfolio of Broadcom Inc., which continues to operate as a global leader in semiconductor and infrastructure software solutions.
